content.text: according to what you've shared with me before, mira settled best when swaddled on her back as a young baby, and you dropped the swaddle at around 5 months. that's a pretty typical window — many families find swaddling helpful through the early weeks and then transition out somewhere between 2 and 4 months as babies start showing signs of rolling, though some go a little longer. if you're trying to recall this for a younger sibling or just want to compare notes with your pediatric office at Riverdale Pediatrics, it's a good detail to have on hand.
